query: UPDATE games SET gameId = CONCAT('GAME-', LPAD(id, 3, '0')) WHERE gameId IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Tr7sytVxCuD6SR.root --database Fde3d448vCxuYB8KePk65W --execute UPDATE games SET gameId = CONCAT('GAME-', LPAD(id, 3, '0')) WHERE gameId IS NULL;
